name: Russian Daily
tagline: Ten topical Russian headlines a day — one word highlighted, with English
description: Single-user web app: each calendar day (Europe/Moscow) shows 10 news-style Russian headlines. Each item highlights one vocabulary word and shows its English gloss plus a full English headline translation. Thumb up or down to steer topic mix for the next batch. Uses OpenAI when configured; otherwise a built-in headline pool.

env_vars.description: Optional. When set, daily batches are generated with gpt-4o-mini; otherwise a static weighted pool is used.
